## What kind of records should this generate

(Describe the record type generically — Contact-like, Activity-like, custom object, etc. Do not name a specific customer object.)

## What makes this hard with current generators

(Why existing Contact/Email/Activity/Case/Knowledge generators don't cover the case.)

## Sketch of input/output contract (optional)

(What inputs the generator should accept, what shape of records it should produce.)

## Use case beyond a single demo

(Why this is worth carrying as a reusable generator and not just a one-off.)
